title: ChangeRequest
description: A change request representing a pending modification to a feature flag definition that requires approval.

id.description: Unique identifier for the change request

status.description: Current status of the change request

split.description: Name of the feature flag being modified

environment.description: Environment in which the change is proposed

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the change request was created

approvers.description: Users who can approve the change request
